models.title: Schluter Kerdi 12x12 Shower Niche With Frame
source_fields:
The Schluter Kerdi 12x12 Shower Niche With Frame is a prefabricated, waterproof niche made from durable KERDI-BOARD. Designed for easy installation within Kerdi and KERDI-BOARD shower assemblies, it provides a ready-to-tile surface and dependable waterproofing for long-lasting performance.

  • Prefabricated, waterproof shower niche made of KERDI-BOARD
  • Includes screws, washers, and a KERDI-BAND frame for sealing seams
  • Measures 12 in wide, 12 in high, and 3½ in deep
  • ½ in thick by 2 in wide bonding flange ensures secure installation
  • Compatible with Kerdi and KERDI-BOARD shower systems
  • Can be paired with the Schluter-Shelf-N (sold separately) for added customization

Ideal for creating sleek, built-in shower storage, the Schluter Kerdi 12x12 Shower Niche With Frame combines functionality and style while simplifying waterproofing during tile installation.

models.title: Laticrete Hydro Ban Niche 8 in. x 12 in. and 8 in. x 6 in. Narrow Combo
source_fields:
Laticrete Hydro Ban Niche 8 in. x 12 in. and 8 in. x 6 in. Narrow Combo is a ready-to-tile shower niche designed to simplify waterproofing and installation. Its durable, lightweight construction and code-approved waterproofing make it a reliable solution for residential and commercial projects.

  • Lightweight and durable, easy to transport and handle during installation
  • Factory-installed, code-approved waterproofing meets ANSI A118.10 requirements
  • Ready-to-tile design saves time and effort on the job site
  • Multiple design options and sizes available for flexibility in shower layouts
  • Component of LATICRETE Lifetime Tile & Stone System Warranty, ensuring single-source responsibility
  • Works seamlessly with tile and stone installation materials

Laticrete Hydro Ban Niche 8 in. x 12 in. and 8 in. x 6 in. Narrow Combo delivers convenience, durability, and peace of mind for professional and DIY installers alike. Its ready-to-use design and compatibility with the Laticrete system help ensure a waterproof, long-lasting shower installation.
